creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Henrich Hartzer from comment #8)

I would add '!$' to the list alongside '!!' feature.

The !$ is the LAST argument of previous command.



Example 1:

    # pwd
    /
    
    # mkdir asd
    
    # cd !$
    cd asd
    
    # pwd
    /asd



Example 2:

    # grep hostname /etc/rc.conf
    hostname='asd'
    
    # vi !$
    vi /etc/rc.conf



Hope that helps.

Regards,
vermaden
